infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Iron Ledger uses your camera to photograph firearms, accessories, purchase receipts, and ATF documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Iron Ledger accesses your photo library to attach images to firearm and accessory records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Iron Ledger saves exported insurance reports to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Iron Ledger uses Face ID to unlock your encrypted firearm vault.
